abilities.name: Nihilism
abilities.text: When this model would gain a token, it may discard a card instead.

abilities.name: Plagueborn
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce the damage by an amount equal to the number of friendly Blight tokens on models within 6" (maximum 4).

abilities.name: Source of the Contagion
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate within 6" gain a Blight token.

actions.name: The Black Staff
actions.effects: The target gains a Stunned token and a Blight token.

actions.name: Lure
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward this model.

triggers.name: Quarantine
triggers.text: This model and the target gain an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Taint
triggers.text: The target gains a Blight token.

actions.name: Bleeding Disease
actions.effects: This model may remove a Blight token from the target to deal +1 damage.

triggers.name: A New Outbreak
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again, targeting a different model with a Blight token within 10" of the target, ignoring range and LoS.

actions.name: Pustulent Tumors
actions.effects: Enemies within (aura)3" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Blight token. Models that would gain a Blight token from this action, but already have one, are dealt 2 damage.
